title: dalbergia oliveri
intro: Dalbergia oliveri, also known as the Philippine rosewood or katala, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. This tree is valued for its fragrant and durable wood, which is used in traditional medicine and as a source of essential oil. The medicinal properties of Dalbergia oliveri include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of using Dalbergia oliveri include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, and herbal preparations such as essential oil, decoctions, and infusions are used to harness its medicinal properties.
